title: RIP
description: Your soul will spawn at your death's location. Each death makes you weaker.
body:
Add souls where you or your friends died, and save your last Death coordinates. It also reduce your max health on each death. Get back your hearts recovering your souls! ## Main features - Spawn your soul on death (default : 1 hours, chunk loaded). - Lose 1 max heart per death. Gain 1 heart per recovered soul. - Only you can recover your own souls and get a short regeneration effect. - Display your death position on death. - Display your death position on ```/trigger rip``` command. - Soul protects your nearby items in 16 blocks range. - Fancy animation on player close range. ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fkrip:options/get```
Patreon Supporters - **1.21.11 (29/12/2025):** Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.9 (16/10/2025):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, varinyc, Setsu-P, Wani P, Lionel Felke - **1.21.6 (2025-07-16):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P - **1.21.5 (2025-07-15):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P - **1.21.2 (2024-11-08):** Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Aidan McCreary, varinyc, Setsu-P, Maximilian Adler, ODS, Jamie B - **1.21 (2024-06-30):** 아아앨, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Aidan McCreary, Excore, Setsu-P - **1.20.5 (2024-05-25):** Angelo Russo, 아아앨, EXcore, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Memick Kung, Aidan McCreary, Setsu-P - **1.20.4 (2023-12-26):** Angelo Russo, 깔수, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, God Emperor Leto II Atriedes - **1.20 (2023-06-25):** Delivator, Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Phantom-Glitch-Wolf, John Stampe, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Yokie, Deadlot3, Darklad32 - **1.19 Update (2022-06-21):** Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, Peter Schubert, ooF, Tân Huỳnh - **1.18 Update (2021-12-14):** - - **1.17 Update (2021-06-13):** - - **Dark Souls Update (2021-01-31):** - - **V1 (2020-03-26):** -
Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
Issue / Bug Gamerule immediate_respawn should be set to false. If not, some deaths (not involving an attacker, like drowning, burning) will spawn the soul at respawn location.
